document.docTitle: Premna maxima T. C. E. Fr.
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Habitat: LMWF, LMDF; up to 1 900 m. Distribution: IIIb.
Voucher: Lower Imenti Forest, Alt. 1 190 m, 26–28 Jun. 1974, Faden & Faden 74/901 (EA, WAG).
